EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A session is initiated for the user {subject.name} on host {nas_ip}
A session is disconnected for the user {subject.name} on host {nas_ip}
A {protocol} session is disconnected for the user {subject.name} from host {src.host} on host {nas_ip}
A {protocol} session is initiated for the user {subject.name} from host {src.host} on host {nas_ip}
